country.name: Malaysia
country.authoritativePublisher: Jabatan Perkhidmatan Awam (JPA) — Public Service Department

meta.source: Jabatan Perkhidmatan Awam (JPA) — Sistem Saraan Perkhidmatan Awam (SSPA), Pekeliling Perkhidmatan Bilangan 1 Tahun 2024, Lampiran D
meta.status: AUTO-VERIFIED — 686/686 cells public-ready as of 2026-05-15. Last auto-fetch by my:extras-v1.
meta.notes: Malaysia implemented the SSPA (Sistem Saraan Perkhidmatan Awam) effective 1 December 2024 under Pekeliling Perkhidmatan Bilangan 1 Tahun 2024, replacing the previous Sistem Saraan Malaysia. Structure: 2 groups — Pengurusan & Profesional (grades 9-15 + 13P) and Pelaksana (grades 1-8). Each grade has JGMM (min-max range) with KGT annual increment rate. Annual = monthly × 12 before allowances (ITKA housing, COLA, etc. vary by posting).

grades.description: Chief Justice of Malaysia (Ketua Hakim Negara). Base monthly salary RM36,000 per Judges' Remuneration Act 1971 (Act 45), First Schedule.
Chief Judge of the High Court in Malaya (Hakim Besar Mahkamah Tinggi Malaya). Base monthly salary RM30,500 per Judges' Remuneration Act 1971 (Act 45), First Schedule.
Chief Judge of the High Court in Sabah and Sarawak (Hakim Besar Mahkamah Tinggi Sabah & Sarawak). Base monthly salary RM30,000 per Judges' Remuneration Act 1971 (Act 45), First Schedule.
Judge of the Court of Appeal (Hakim Mahkamah Rayuan). Base monthly salary RM27,500 per Judges' Remuneration Act 1971 (Act 45), First Schedule.
Judge of the Federal Court (Hakim Mahkamah Persekutuan). Base monthly salary RM28,500 per Judges' Remuneration Act 1971 (Act 45), First Schedule.
Judge of the High Courts (Hakim Mahkamah Tinggi). Base monthly salary RM26,500 per Judges' Remuneration Act 1971 (Act 45), First Schedule.
President of the Court of Appeal (Presiden Mahkamah Rayuan). Base monthly salary RM31,500 per Judges' Remuneration Act 1971 (Act 45), First Schedule.
Pelaksana Gred 1 — entry-level operational staff.
Pelaksana Gred 2 — basic operational staff.
Pelaksana Gred 3 — junior operational staff.
Pelaksana Gred 4 — operational staff.
Pelaksana Gred 5 — intermediate operational staff.
Pelaksana Gred 6 — senior operational staff.
Pelaksana Gred 7 — experienced execution staff.
Pelaksana Gred 8 — senior execution staff / supervisor.
Deputy Minister (Timbalan Menteri). Monthly base salary RM10,847.65 per Members of Parliament (Remuneration) Act 1980 (Act 237).
Deputy Prime Minister (Timbalan Perdana Menteri). Monthly base salary RM18,168.15 per Members of Parliament (Remuneration) Act 1980 (Act 237).
Minister (Menteri Kabinet). Monthly base salary RM14,907.20 per Members of Parliament (Remuneration) Act 1980 (Act 237).
Member of the House of Representatives (Ahli Dewan Rakyat) — base allowance. Monthly base salary RM6,508.59 per Members of Parliament (Remuneration) Act 1980 (Act 237).
Parliamentary Secretary (Setiausaha Parlimen). Monthly base salary RM7,187.40 per Members of Parliament (Remuneration) Act 1980 (Act 237).
Deputy President of the Senate (Timbalan Yang di-Pertua Dewan Negara) — salary only. Monthly base salary RM9,680.00 per Members of Parliament (Remuneration) Act 1980 (Act 237).
President of the Senate (Yang di-Pertua Dewan Negara) — salary only. Monthly base salary RM14,219.92 per Members of Parliament (Remuneration) Act 1980 (Act 237).
Deputy Speaker of the House of Representatives (Timbalan Yang di-Pertua Dewan Rakyat) — salary only. Monthly base salary RM9,680.00 per Members of Parliament (Remuneration) Act 1980 (Act 237).
Speaker of the House of Representatives (Yang di-Pertua Dewan Rakyat) — salary only. Monthly base salary RM14,219.92 per Members of Parliament (Remuneration) Act 1980 (Act 237).
Prime Minister (Perdana Menteri). Monthly base salary RM22,826.65 per Members of Parliament (Remuneration) Act 1980 (Act 237).
Senator / Member of the Senate (Ahli Dewan Negara) — base allowance. Monthly base salary RM4,112.79 per Members of Parliament (Remuneration) Act 1980 (Act 237).
Pengurusan & Profesional Gred 9 — entry-level professional (graduate entry).
Pengurusan & Profesional Gred 10 — mid-career professional.
Pengurusan & Profesional Gred 11 — experienced professional / team lead.
Pengurusan & Profesional Gred 12 — middle management.
Pengurusan & Profesional Gred 13 — middle-to-senior management.
Pengurusan & Profesional Gred 13P — special senior entry/progression band.
Pengurusan & Profesional Gred 14 — senior management.
Pengurusan & Profesional Gred 15 — senior management (Pengarah / Timbalan KSU level).
Gred Khas Turus I — Special Grade Turus I. Pengurusan Tertinggi under SSPA (effective 1 December 2024). Monthly salary range RM12,240 – RM33,950, step increment 9% KGT.
Gred Khas Turus II — Special Grade Turus II. Pengurusan Tertinggi under SSPA (effective 1 December 2024). Monthly salary range RM11,380 – RM31,140, step increment 9% KGT.
Gred Khas Turus III — Special Grade Turus III. Pengurusan Tertinggi under SSPA (effective 1 December 2024). Monthly salary range RM10,350 – RM28,560, step increment 9% KGT.
Gred Khas A — Special Grade A. Pengurusan Tertinggi under SSPA (effective 1 December 2024). Monthly salary range RM9,400 – RM26,200, step increment 9% KGT.
Gred Khas B — Special Grade B. Pengurusan Tertinggi under SSPA (effective 1 December 2024). Monthly salary range RM8,650 – RM24,030, step increment 9% KGT.
Gred Khas C — Special Grade C. Pengurusan Tertinggi under SSPA (effective 1 December 2024). Monthly salary range RM7,990 – RM22,040, step increment 9% KGT.
Ketua Setiausaha Negara (KSN) — Chief Secretary to the Government. Pengurusan Tertinggi under SSPA (effective 1 December 2024). Monthly salary range RM13,480 – RM37,460, step increment 9% KGT.

Gred Utama Turus I — Superscale Turus I (Director-General of major ministry). Pengurusan Tertinggi under SSPA (effective 1 December 2024). Monthly salary range RM12,410 – RM34,360, step increment 9% KGT.
Gred Utama Turus II — Superscale Turus II. Pengurusan Tertinggi under SSPA (effective 1 December 2024). Monthly salary range RM11,380 – RM31,140, step increment 9% KGT.
Gred Utama Turus III — Superscale Turus III. Pengurusan Tertinggi under SSPA (effective 1 December 2024). Monthly salary range RM10,350 – RM28,560, step increment 9% KGT.
Gred Utama A — Main Superscale A. Pengurusan Tertinggi under SSPA (effective 1 December 2024). Monthly salary range RM9,400 – RM26,200, step increment 9% KGT.
Gred Utama B — Main Superscale B. Pengurusan Tertinggi under SSPA (effective 1 December 2024). Monthly salary range RM8,650 – RM24,030, step increment 9% KGT.
Gred Utama C — Main Superscale C (entry to top management). Pengurusan Tertinggi under SSPA (effective 1 December 2024). Monthly salary range RM7,990 – RM22,040, step increment 9% KGT.
